translations.descriptionEn: This prompt provides a detailed photorealistic description for generating a webcam-style bedroom scene captured through a laptop screen. It focuses on a young woman in a relaxed, candid moment, lying on a bed and using her smartphone, with emphasis on natural posture, subtle facial expression, and cozy indoor styling. The setup includes a MacBook Photo Booth-style interface, visible UI elements, and screen-based framing to replicate an authentic digital capture.

translations.name: 字体排版肖像艺术创作
translations.description: 将肖像转换为仅使用文字的排版艺术作品。图像应保持面部特征和比例，完全由重复的文字组成。遵循关于文字大小和密度的严格规则来模拟深度和阴影。适合创建优雅、极简、高对比度的肖像。
translations.content:
Transform the provided portrait into a 9:16 垂直 typographic artwork built exclusively from repeated name text.

STRICT RULES:
- The image 必须是 com姿势d ONLY of text (e.g., "MUSTAFA KEMAL ATATÜRK").
- No 线, no strokes, no out线, no 形状, no shading, no gradients.
- Do NOT draw anything. Do NOT use any brush or illustration effect.
- No stamp borders or 形状 — only pure text.
- Every 可见 detail must come from the text itself.

TEXT CONSTRAINT:
- ALL text 必须是 small and consistent in size.
- Do NOT use large or oversized text anywhere.
- Font size should re主要 uniform across the entire image.
- The text should feel like 细 颗粒 / micro-typography.

Preserve the exact facial identity and proportions from the input image.

COMPOSITION:
- Slightly zoomed-out portrait (not 特写).
- Include full head with some negative 空间 around.

REGIONAL CONTROL:
- Forehead area should be 干净 or extremely sparse.
- Focus density on eyes, nose, mouth, jawline.

SHADING METHOD:
- Create depth ONLY by changing text density (not size).
- Dark areas = very dense text repetition.
- Light areas = sparse text placement.
- No gradient effects — density alone must simulate light and shadow.

Arrange text with slight variations in rotation and spacing, but keep it 可控 and 干净.

Style:
最小, high-对比度 black text on light background, elegant and editorial.

No extra text outside the repeated name. No logos. No decorative 元素.

The result should 外观 like a re细d typographic portrait where 阴影 are created purely through text density, with zero size variation.
